reason: Authoritative design doc for the entire 3b-1 task. Sub-agents must read §3 (data model), §4 (backend), §5 (frontend), §6 (step 4 handoff), §9 (PR split), §11 (review digest).
Authoritative spec for boundary::assert_within_root. 7 edge case test cases defined; sub-agents implementing the function or its callers must follow this contract.
Existing conventions for sqlx queries, migration style, schema layout. Use as base for db.rs changes (PR1 step 1).
Existing code quality bar (testing, error handling, naming) for all new Rust modules under src-tauri/src/projects/.
Existing error handling conventions (anyhow at boundaries, thiserror in domain). New boundary::assert_within_root + project CRUD error types must follow.
Existing src-tauri directory layout. New src-tauri/src/projects/ module must follow conventions.
Existing Pinia store conventions. New src/stores/projects.ts + chat.ts changes must follow store composition style.
Existing Vue 3 + reka-ui conventions. New ChatWindow.vue Tab bar + empty state components must follow.
Existing TypeScript type strictness. New ProjectInfo / ProjectContext types must follow.
Existing frontend quality bar (manual smoke test, vue-tsc, pnpm build). PR2 end-to-end checks must follow.
Existing src/ layout. New stores/projects.ts placement must follow.
Current schema (sessions / messages). PR1 will ALTER + add projects + Auto-default migration. Read this to know the starting point.
Current chat command + AppState. PR1 will refactor chat to inject ToolContext + 4 existing Tauri commands.
Current execute_tool signature (name, input) -> (output, is_error). PR1 will add ctx parameter.
Current shell tool. PR1 will add working_directory parameter + boundary check.
Current read_file tool. PR1 will resolve relative paths via ctx.cwd + boundary check.
Current write_file tool. PR1 same as read_file.
Current single-project UI. PR2 will add Tab bar + empty state + hidden-projects list.
Current Pinia store. PR2 will add watcher on currentProjectId + send() guard.
Current Pinia config store. PR2 may extend with lastActiveProjectId localStorage persistence.
PR1 will rename project_hash to project_uuid in §3 worktree path; possibly add new §6 project model.
PR1 will update §2.4 to show 3b-1 / 3b-2 split + add 3b-1 progress.
External review. PR1 / PR2 implementers should be aware of issues raised (especially §2 compatibility gaps, §3 Q5/Q6 cwd boundary, §4.1-4.3 missing details).
External review. Especially §1.1 affected commands table, §1.2 ToolContext mechanism, §3.1 PR split rationale, §4.2 pick_project_dir fallback.
